# Fixture for extracted/DerivedGeneralCategory.txt — general category per range.
# Format: XXXX[..YYYY]; gc_value
# Covers a representative slice: control, letter, mark, number, punctuation,
# symbol, separator, plus the CJK range that exercises range handling.
0000..001F; Cc
0020; Zs
0021..002F; Po
0030..0039; Nd
0041..005A; Lu
005B..0060; Ps
0061..007A; Ll
4E00..9FFF; Lo
